productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Stripes Brown Tie
description: Dressing the elite for years, Reid and Taylor has crafted some of the classiest accessories that rise your level of sophistication with ease. This tie from the Scottish brand is no exception. What's even better is that the fabric is treated to stay protected from stains. Wear it over well-fitting dress shirts in muted shades and crisp formals. Length: 150 cm Made of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheen Has stripes in shades of brown and lavender One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care Dry clean only
